codeReview.summary: The fix commit directly addresses the prior failure by replacing the single layout-variant fixture with paired layout-variant-a/layout-variant-b cases that exercise the expanded semantic families across non-semantic layout differences, then asserting both parser-facing provenance and resolved entity projections remain identical across those variants. The change stays fixture-only within crates/h7cad-native-dwg/tests/read_headers.rs and preserves the atomic evidence chain requested by the follow-up feature.

summary: Pass: reviewed the original failed feature diff (8c96475) and the fix diff (8e165de). The original commit missed equivalent-layout coverage for the expanded semantic families; the fix adds paired layout-variant fixtures plus targeted parser/resolved assertions that cover TEXT, MTXT, INSERT, layer-table, block, and layout semantics across equivalent layouts while staying fixture-only.
